channel.title: Reform NB — Investigative Journalism
channel.description: New Brunswick's Investigative Hub covering healthcare, housing, oligarchy, and environment

item.title: 2,199 ER Deaths: Auditor General Confirms Healthcare Failure
item.description: Auditor General confirms 2,199 patients pronounced deceased after arriving at NB ERs between 2020-2024. 43% not seen within safe triage times.

item.title: Campbellton at 41%: The 2026 NB Poverty Report Card
item.description: Latest HDC data reveals 4 out of 10 children in Campbellton living in poverty. Indigenous reserves at 51.2%.

item.title: NB Power Burns 4M Barrels of Oil: Emissions Hit 16-Year High
item.description: New EUB filings reveal NB Power burned nearly 4 million barrels of oil in 12 months, pushing emissions to 3M+ tonnes.

item.title: Fredericton Chemical Spill: Government Slow to Respond
item.description: A potentially cancer-causing chemical coated roads across Fredericton. The government's slow response raises regulatory capture questions.

item.title: Tent Cities and 440 Youth Without Shelter
item.description: 1,500+ chronically homeless across Moncton, Saint John, and Fredericton. 100+ unhoused deaths in 2025.

item.title: NB: The Irving Company Province
item.description: One family dominates a province. 1.8M acres of forest. 20 newspapers. Canada's largest refinery. An oligarchy unparalleled in the developed world.
